Vendored from the locally installed Arch Linux nlohmann-json package.

- Source path: /usr/include/nlohmann
- Copied into the repository on 2026-03-26
- Package/header version: 3.12.0

This tree is used as the preferred header source by CMake.
If the vendored copy is removed, CMake falls back to a system include path that provides
`nlohmann/json.hpp`.
